XACT_PREPARE_SOUNDCUE

Contains information for preparing/playing a sound cue.

typedef struct _XACT_PREPARE_SOUNDCUE{
    DWORD dwFlags;
    DWORD dwCueIndex;
    PXACTSOUNDSOURCE pSoundSource;
    PCXACT_PARAMETER_CONTROL_DESC pParameterControls;
} XACT_PREPARE_SOUNDCUE, *PXACT_PREPARE_SOUNDCUE;

typedef const XACT_PREPARE_SOUNDCUE *PCXACT_PREPARE_SOUNDCUE;

Members

dwFlags
Flags affecting prepare/play:
Value Description
XACT_FLAG_SOUNDCUE_PRIME Indicates that the sound cue should be primed.
XACT_FLAG_SOUNDCUE_AUTORELEASE Causes the cue to be automatically released when playback is finished (no sound cue pointer is returned). This has no effect on subsequent playback of the cue.
XACT_FLAG_SOUNDCUE_PREPARED This flag must be set when passing a valid sound cue instance from a prior call to the IXACTSoundBank::Prepare or IXACTSoundBank::PrepareEx method.

This flag is not valid for use with the XACT_FLAG_SOUNDCUE_USE_LAST_VARIATION flag.
XACT_FLAG_SOUNDCUE_USE_LAST_VARIATION Indicates that the sound cue should use the last sound selected, assuming that multiple sounds are associated with the cue. That sound will continue to be selected until the function is called without specifying XACT_FLAG_SOUNDCUE_USE_LAST_VARIATION, at which point the sounds are selected at random again.

This does not affect wave variations. If the sound has a play event with wave variations, the waves will be selected at random. Similarly, pitch and volume variations are unaffected by this flag.

If no previous sound has been selected before using this flag, a sound will be selected at random.

This flag is not valid for use with the XACT_FLAG_SOUNDCUE_PREPARED flag.
dwCueIndex
Value indicating the index of the sound cue to be prepared/played.
pSoundSource
Pointer to an IXACTSoundSource created using the IXACTEngine::CreateSoundSource method.

Note    This member must be NULL when the structure is used as a parameter for the IXACTSoundBank::PrepareEx method.

pParameterControls
Pointer to an optional array of parameter controls. The parameter controls passed to IXACTSoundBank::PlayEx and IXACTSoundBank::PrepareEx must all be of the SoundCueInstance scope (see the XACT_PARAMETER_ENTRY section for more information.) Global sliders are not allowed. In addition, the pSoundCue member of all entries must be NULL.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xact.h.

See Also

IXACTSoundBank::PlayEx, IXACTSoundBank::PrepareEx
